description: Ketubba fragment (upper left corner). Location: Fustat. Dated: Ḥeshvan 13[..] Seleucid, which is 989–1088 CE. The bride's name appears in l. 3 but is difficult to read. The document was torn up and covered with other jottings in Hebrew script and Arabic script.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-10. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
